positive: An intricate, symmetrical celestial map mixed with bioluminescent flora. The design features abstract constellations drawn with fine, sharp gold line work, interwoven with stylized mandalas of exotic leaves, crescent moons, and geometric celestial bodies. The composition must be highly detailed, perfectly symmetrical, and designed for a strong central silhouette, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Minimalist scientific illustration meets Art Nouveau linocut, with deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and pops of glowing gold leaf accents. High contrast, vector art style, clean edges, perfect balance, isolated on a white background.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, amateur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, artifacts
